summary: Frontend testing completed for Visor de Actualización - Construcciones Bug Fix. All 5 test cases PASSED. The bug where construcciones (6912 buildings) were not rendering on the map has been fixed. The ClipboardList import was added correctly and the construccionesVersion state forces proper re-render of GeoJSON layers.
critical_code_review_comments: The fix correctly adds ClipboardList to the lucide-react imports (line 97)
The construccionesVersion state (line 215) properly forces GeoJSON re-render when construcciones data changes
Console logs confirm: '[Visor] ✓ Construcciones cargadas: 6912' and '[Visor] Procesando 6912 construcciones, filtro: todos'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Visor de Actualización construcciones bug is FIXED. The ClipboardList import and construccionesVersion state changes resolved the rendering issue. 6912 construcciones now load and display correctly.

1_visor_loads_geometries.details: Visor de Actualización loads correctly with map showing terrenos in green (rural) and blue (urbano). Project title 'Proyecto_prueba_ZU_Sardinata' visible.

2_construcciones_displayed.details: Console confirms: '[Visor] ✓ Construcciones cargadas: 6912'. The construcciones data is loaded from backend and processed for display.

3_const_badge_shows_count.details: Badge 'Const. ✓ 6912' is visible in the UI header, confirming 6912 construcciones are loaded.

4_mejoras_badge_shows_count.details: Badge 'Mejoras: 1969' is visible in the UI header. Console shows: '[Visor] Terrenos con mejoras identificados: 526'

5_no_javascript_errors.details: No ClipboardList errors or 'not defined' errors found in console. The import fix resolved the original bug.

bug_fix_verification.original_bug: Construcciones (6912 buildings) were not rendering on the map in Visor de Actualización
bug_fix_verification.root_cause: Missing import of ClipboardList from lucide-react caused 'ClipboardList is not defined' error that blocked rendering
fix_applied: Added construccionesVersion state to force GeoJSON re-render when construcciones change (line 215)

map_display.geometries: Terrenos displayed in green (rural) and blue (urbano)
map_display.construcciones: Data loaded (6912), rendered in red when zoomed to urban area

console_logs_summary.errors: No critical errors. Minor IndexedDB warning for offline sync (not related to bug)
